entries.title: Syntax-highlighted editors and auto-format
entries.summary: Formatter and converter tools now use a real text editor with syntax highlighting on both panes, and result-producing tools auto-run on input change so you don't have to click a button to see output.
changes: Added CodeMirror 6 editors with syntax highlighting to every formatter and converter tool.
Editors follow the site light/dark theme and pick token colors from the brand palette.
All result-producing tools auto-run on input or option changes (debounced).
Added a 404 page with a popular-tools fallback grid.
Patch-note entries now have stable anchor links matching the RSS feed.

entries.title: Static rebuild
entries.summary: Full ground-up rebuild as a static site. Pages are now plain HTML with no framework runtime, faster first paint, and per-tool JavaScript loaded only on the page that needs it. Added a built-in dark theme that follows the system preference.
changes: Pre-rendered every page to static HTML for instant first paint.
Replaced framework runtime with small per-tool ES module bundles.
Replaced emoji icons with inline SVG for crisper rendering.
Generated sitemap.xml, rss.xml, and robots.txt at build time.

entries.title: JSON minify and patch notes
entries.summary: Added a minify mode to the JSON formatter and introduced a patch notes page to track ongoing changes.
changes: JSON formatter now supports a minify toggle.
Added the How It Works page.

entries.title: Diff and time zones
entries.summary: Added a side-by-side text diff tool and a time zone converter.
changes: New Text Diff tool with line-by-line highlighting.
String Measure tool now reports per-character breakdown.
